title: Natadreeswarar Temple
tagline: Natadreeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Nattadreeswarar Temple (Nattātreeswarar) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Nattadreeswarar Temple (Nattātreeswarar) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is located on a hillock island within River Kaveri, near Erode, off the Erode-Karur Highway., halfway between Kudagu and Bay of Bengal at Kaveripoompattinam.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nanjai Uthukuli
topPlaces.description: Nanjai Uthukuli is a large village located in Erode district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Erayamangalam
topPlaces.description: Erayamangalam, also written Iraiyamankalam, is a small village and Panchayat located in Namakkal district (Tamil Nadu / India) on the bank of the Kaveri River.

topPlaces.name: Kattuvelampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kattuvelampalayam is a village of Namakkal district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Modakurichi
topPlaces.description: Modakurichi is a panchayat town and taluk headquarters of Modakurichi taluk in Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Uthukuli block
topPlaces.description: Uthukuli block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 37 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Uthukuli
topPlaces.description: Uthukuli is a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 15 panchayat towns in the district, and the administrative headquarters of Uthukuli taluk.

topPlaces.name: Lakkapuram
topPlaces.description: Lakkapuram or Punjai Lakkapuram is a Village Panchayat located in Erode district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Lakkapuram village falls under Modakurichi taluk.

topPlaces.name: Molasi
topPlaces.description: Molasi is a village situated 16 km south of Tiruchengode in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the bank of the river Cauvery, which flows from Coorg hills.

items.note: Nanjai Uthukuli is a large village located in Erode district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Erayamangalam, also written Iraiyamankalam, is a small village and Panchayat located in Namakkal district (Tamil Nadu / India) on the bank of the Kaveri River.
Kattuvelampalayam is a village of Namakkal district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
Modakurichi is a panchayat town and taluk headquarters of Modakurichi taluk in Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.
Uthukuli block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 37 panchayat villages.
Uthukuli is a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 15 panchayat towns in the district, and the administrative headquarters of Uthukuli taluk.
Lakkapuram or Punjai Lakkapuram is a Village Panchayat located in Erode district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Lakkapuram village falls under Modakurichi taluk.
Molasi is a village situated 16 km south of Tiruchengode in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the bank of the river Cauvery, which flows from Coorg hills.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Natadreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Natadreeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Natadreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (87 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Natadreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Natadreeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Natadreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Natadreeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Natadreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nanjai Uthukuli, Erayamangalam, Kattuvelampalayam, Modakurichi, Uthukuli block.
